channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Junior Social Media Assistant — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Help grow our social channels. Pitch fresh formats and ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Editorial Coordinator — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Pitch, draft and edit original explainers. Bring fresh editorial angles. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Data Analyst — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Turn Zimbabwe public data into clear visual stories. Bring new data ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Business Development Associate — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Open doors for advertisers, sponsors and partners across the Zim diaspora corridor. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Schools Can Now Unleash Debt Collectors On Parents For Unpaid Fees
item.description: Schools can now hire debt collectors to recover unpaid fees, leaving struggling parents facing mounting pressure, legal threats, and financial distress. The post Schools Can Now Unleash Debt Collectors On Parents For Unpaid Fees appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Green economy projects key to livelihoods, climate resilience: EMA
item.description: Sikhumbuzo Moyo, THE Sustainable Cities and Green Economy initiatives are not merely environmental projects but strategic investments aimed at improving livelihoods, restoring ecosystems and strengthening Zimbabwe’s climate resilience, the Environmental... via Ebusiness Weekly #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Ebusiness Weekly

item.title: Harare Records No Confirmed Hantavirus Cases: City Council
item.description: City of Harare Confirms No Hantavirus Cases The City of Harare has assured residents that there are currently no confirmed cases of hantavirus infection in the capital following growing international concern over outbreaks linked to cruise ship travel. In a public statement issue via Iharare News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Harare Records No Confirmed Hantavirus Cases: City Council
item.description: City of Harare Confirms No Hantavirus Cases The City of Harare has assured residents that there are currently no confirmed cases of hantavirus infection in the capital following growing international concern over outbreaks linked to cruise ship travel. item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Wicknell Chivayo Buys US$34 Million Gulfstream G550 Private Jet @wicknellchivayo
item.description: Wicknell Chivayo Shows Off New US$34 Million Gulfstream G550 Jet Zimbabwean businessman Wicknell Chivayo has announced the purchase of a new Gulfstream G550 private jet, saying the luxury aircraft will soon arrive in Zimbabwe. Chivayo shared the news on his Facebook account on Fr via Iharare News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News
